return(function(...)local k=type local G=table.concat local W=string.sub local X=math.floor local g=table.insert local t=Y local L=string.char local R=string.len for Y=-624291-(-624292),#t,-681083+681084 do local A=t[Y]if return(function(Y,G,W,X,g,t,L,S,l,R,A,h,z,k,q,D,U,a,I,w,n)n,h,l,U,w,R,k,D,q,z,I,a,A,S=function(Y,H)local G=a(H)local W=function(W,X,g,t,L)return k(Y,{W;X;g,t;L},H,G)end return W end,function(Y)local W=function(W)return k(Y,{W},H,G)end return W end,function(Y,H)local G=a(H)local W=function(W,X,g,t)return k(Y,{W;X;g,t},H,G)end return W end,function(Y,H)local G=a(H)local W=function(W,X,g)return k(Y,{W,X,g},H,G)end return W end,{},function(k,W,X,g)local P,L,v,M,x,b,j,i,a,r,V,h,A,Z,I,o,s,d,p,O,u,T,m,F,y,C,N,S,e,K,Q,J,B,E while k do if k<622798+7644617 then if k<4558818-(-283572)then if
